moments.title: World Cup: France vs Senegal
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues with a group stage clash between France and Senegal today at 3:00 PM ET.

angles.name: Match Hype
angles.copy: World Cup fever! France take on Senegal today in what promises to be a thrilling group stage encounter. Who are you backing?

angles.name: Global Footy
angles.copy: It's a big one in the World Cup today: France vs Senegal. Get ready for some top-tier international football action!

moments.title: England's World Cup Battle
moments.blurb: England faces Croatia in a crucial group stage match at the FIFA World Cup 2026 tomorrow.

angles.name: Three Lions Prep
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the Three Lions are back in action! England clash with Croatia in their next World Cup group game. Can they secure the points?

angles.name: Big Game Buzz
angles.copy: Get ready for a massive World Cup fixture tomorrow as England take on Croatia. Who needs this win more?

moments.title: Olivia Rodrigo tops UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: Olivia Rodrigo's 'STUPID SONG' is currently at Number 1 on the Official Singles Chart Update for June 14-20, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Olivia Rodrigo has done it again! 'STUPID SONG' is currently sitting pretty at Number 1 on the Official Singles Chart Update. Is it on your playlist?

angles.name: New No.1
angles.copy: Your midweek chart update is in! Olivia Rodrigo's 'STUPID SONG' is the UK's current Number 1. Huge for Olivia!

moments.title: Clarkson's Farm Season 5 Finale
moments.blurb: The final episodes (7-8) of Clarkson's Farm Season 5 premiere tomorrow, June 17, on Prime Video.

angles.name: Farm Finale
angles.copy: It's almost time to say goodbye to Diddly Squat Farm for another season! The final episodes of Clarkson's Farm Season 5 drop tomorrow on Prime Video. What's been your favourite moment?

angles.name: Jeremy's Journey
angles.copy: Tomorrow brings the conclusion of Clarkson's Farm Season 5. Expect more chaos, triumphs, and Jeremy's unique take on farming. Will you be binge-watching?

moments.title: House of the Dragon Season 3 returns
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated third season of 'House of the Dragon' returns this month, continuing the Targaryen civil war.

angles.name: Dragon Fire
angles.copy: Get ready for more Targaryen drama! House of the Dragon Season 3 is back this month. Who's excited for the return to Westeros?

angles.name: Westeros Awaits
angles.copy: The battle for the Iron Throne heats up again this month as House of the Dragon Season 3 premieres. Are you Team Rhaenyra or Team Alicent?

moments.title: The Bear Season 5 release
moments.blurb: The critically acclaimed series 'The Bear' returns for its fifth season in June 2026.

angles.name: Back to the Kitchen
angles.copy: Chef Carmy and the crew are back! Season 5 of 'The Bear' is here this June. Prepare for more intense kitchen drama and delicious food.

angles.name: Yes, Chef!
angles.copy: Can't wait for The Bear Season 5? It's arriving this month! Get ready for another helping of the acclaimed series.

moments.title: Happy Birthday MC Ren
moments.blurb: MC Ren, member of legendary hip-hop group N.W.A, turns 57 today.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the 'Ruthless Villain' himself, MC Ren of N.W.A! What's your favourite track?

angles.name: N.W.A Legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating MC Ren's 57th birthday today! A true pioneer of gangsta rap and an N.W.A legend.

moments.title: Happy Birthday John Newman
moments.blurb: British soul singer John Newman, known for hits like 'Love Me Again', turns 36 today.

angles.name: Soulful Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 36th Birthday to the incredible John Newman! What's your go-to track from him?

angles.name: Love Me Again
angles.copy: It's John Newman's 36th birthday! Still loving 'Love Me Again' on repeat.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Sir Paul McCartney
moments.blurb: Legendary musician Sir Paul McCartney turns 84 on Thursday, June 18.

angles.name: Music Royalty
angles.copy: On Thursday, the legendary Sir Paul McCartney celebrates his 84th birthday! What's your favourite Beatles, Wings, or solo track?

angles.name: Hey Jude
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a true icon! Sir Paul McCartney turns 84 on Thursday. A musical genius!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Alison Moyet
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for Yazoo and her solo work, turns 65 on Thursday, June 18.

angles.name: Yazoo Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 65th birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet on Thursday! From Yazoo to her powerful solo career, she's a legend.

angles.name: Only You
angles.copy: Alison Moyet celebrates her 65th birthday this Thursday! Still love 'Only You'!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Josh Dun
moments.blurb: Josh Dun, drummer for the Grammy-winning duo Twenty One Pilots, turns 38 on Thursday, June 18.

angles.name: Drummer's Day
angles.copy: Happy 38th Birthday to the incredible Josh Dun of Twenty One Pilots on Thursday! The beats are always on point.

angles.name: TØP Beats
angles.copy: Throwing it back for Josh Dun's 38th birthday on Thursday! What's your favourite Twenty One Pilots track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Lionel Richie
moments.blurb: Music icon Lionel Richie turns 77 on Saturday, June 20.

angles.name: Hello Lionel
angles.copy: Is it him you're looking for? It's Lionel Richie's 77th birthday on Saturday! A true legend.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only Lionel Richie's 77th birthday this Saturday! What's your favourite song from the Commodores or his solo career?

moments.title: Happy Birthday John Taylor
moments.blurb: John Taylor, co-founder and bassist of Duran Duran, turns 66 on Saturday, June 20.

angles.name: Duran Duran Icon
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the stylish John Taylor, bassist of Duran Duran, on Saturday! Still 'Hungry Like the Wolf' for their music.

angles.name: New Wave Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Duran Duran's John Taylor's 66th birthday this Saturday! What's your favourite Duran Duran hit?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Chino Moreno
moments.blurb: Chino Moreno, frontman of the influential alternative metal band Deftones, turns 53 on Saturday, June 20.

angles.name: Deftones Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 53rd Birthday to the one and only Chino Moreno of Deftones on Saturday! Still bringing the heavy riffs and unique vocals.

angles.name: Metal Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating Chino Moreno's 53rd birthday this Saturday! What's your favourite Deftones album?

moments.title: Summer Solstice 2026
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the longest day of the year! The Summer Solstice arrives on Sunday. More daylight for everyone!

angles.name: Solstice Sunrise
angles.copy: The Summer Solstice is this Sunday! Will you be up early to catch the sunrise, especially at iconic spots like Stonehenge?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Lana Del Rey
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey turns 41 on Sunday, June 21.

angles.name: Queen of Sadcore
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the enigmatic Lana Del Rey on Sunday! Which of her tracks is your ultimate favourite?

angles.name: Summertime Sadness
angles.copy: Celebrating Lana Del Rey's 41st birthday this Sunday! Her unique sound continues to captivate.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brandon Flowers
moments.blurb: Brandon Flowers, lead singer of The Killers, turns 45 on Sunday, June 21.

angles.name: Killer's Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 45th Birthday to the iconic Brandon Flowers of The Killers on Sunday! From 'Mr. Brightside' to their latest hits, a true rockstar.

angles.name: Brightside Vibes
angles.copy: It's Brandon Flowers' 45th birthday this Sunday! What's your favourite The Killers anthem?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ray Davies
moments.blurb: Ray Davies, frontman and primary songwriter of The Kinks, turns 82 on Sunday, June 21.

angles.name: Kinks Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 82nd Birthday to the legendary Ray Davies of The Kinks on Sunday! A true British music icon.

angles.name: Waterloo Sunset
angles.copy: It's Ray Davies' 82nd birthday this Sunday! Still love The Kinks' timeless classics.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Cyndi Lauper
moments.blurb: Pop icon Cyndi Lauper turns 73 on Monday, June 22.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the wonderfully vibrant Cyndi Lauper on Monday! Her music still makes us want to dance.

angles.name: True Colors
angles.copy: Celebrating Cyndi Lauper's 73rd birthday this Monday! What's your favourite hit from the 80s legend?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Todd Rundgren
moments.blurb: Influential rock musician and producer Todd Rundgren turns 78 on Monday, June 22.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Visionary
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the multi-talented Todd Rundgren on Monday! A true pioneer in rock music and production.

angles.name: Producer Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Todd Rundgren's 78th birthday this Monday! His impact on music is immeasurable.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jimmy Somerville
moments.blurb: Scottish singer Jimmy Somerville, known for Bronski Beat and The Communards, turns 65 on Monday, June 22.

angles.name: 80s Dance Icon
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to the incredible Jimmy Somerville on Monday! From Bronski Beat to The Communards, his voice is unmistakable.

angles.name: Smalltown Boy
angles.copy: Celebrating Jimmy Somerville's 65th birthday this Monday! Still love his powerful vocals and classic hits.

moments.title: Golowan Festival in Penzance
moments.blurb: Penzance's annual Golowan Festival, celebrating the summer solstice with music and dancing, kicks off on Friday, June 19, and runs until June 28.

angles.name: Penzance Party
angles.copy: The Golowan Festival begins in Penzance this Friday! Get ready for a week of music, dancing, and community spirit celebrating the summer solstice. Who's heading to Cornwall?

angles.name: Cornwall Celebrates
angles.copy: This Friday marks the start of Penzance's Golowan Festival, bringing vibrant solstice celebrations to West Cornwall. Don't miss out!
